title: C++ Programming Basics: Keywords Overview
desc: A comprehensive list of C++ keywords organized by category for beginners.

title: Python Escape Characters Guide
desc: Learn common escape sequences like \n, \t, and raw strings in Python.

title: Advanced Calculus: Taylor's Theorem Review
desc: Covers Taylor's theorem with Peano, Lagrange, and Cauchy remainder forms.

title: 高等微积分作业：级数收敛性分析
desc: 判断六个级数的收敛发散性，使用比较、比值、根值判别法。

title: Advanced Calculus 2 Homework 10
desc: Surface and line integrals computation with parameterization.

title: 高等微积分作业：幂级数与函数展开
desc: 分析幂级数收敛域、求和公式及函数展开，证明关键等式。

title: 高等微积分作业：度量空间与不等式
desc: 证明连续函数空间度量、Cauchy列收敛、柯西不等式及开集表示。

title: Advanced Calculus Homework 4 Analysis
desc: Proofs of minimum on R^2 and extreme values on unit circle.

title: Advanced Calculus 2 Homework 5
desc: Partial derivatives computation for various composite functions.

title: Advanced Calculus Homework 6 Analysis
desc: Implicit function theorem and Taylor expansion for z(x,y) near (1,1).

title: Advanced Calculus 2 Homework 7 Analysis
desc: Find critical points and classify extrema for two functions.

title: Advanced Calculus Homework 8 Solutions
desc: Area and integral calculations using variable transformations.

title: Advanced Calculus 2 Homework 9: Surface Area and Center of Mass
desc: Compute ellipsoid surface area via double integral and hemisphere center of mass.

title: Complex Function Homework 1
desc: Proof of modulus equality and trigonometric multiple-angle formulas.

title: Complex Analysis Homework 10: Residue Theorem
desc: Computing definite integrals using residue theorem with contour integration.

title: 复变函数第11次作业：留数定理应用
desc: 利用留数定理计算三个含参数积分，涉及支点割线围道技巧。

title: 复变函数作业：初等与多值函数
desc: 证明三角与双曲函数的恒等式及模不等式。

title: 复变函数作业：多值函数与支点分析
desc: 判断多值函数支点，计算沿不同路径的函数值。

title: 复变函数第4次作业解析
desc: 计算复积分并证明Poisson公式，涉及留数定理应用。

title: 复变函数第5次作业分析
desc: 判断级数收敛性，给出反例与证明，涉及正项级数和复数级数。

title: Complex Function Homework 6 Analysis
desc: Determines convergence radii and sum functions, proving discontinuity at z=1.

title: 复变函数第7次作业：Taylor展开
desc: 求解sec z、ln((1+z)/(1-z))和sqrt((1-z)/(1+z))的Taylor级数及收敛半径。

title: 复变函数第8次作业：Laurent展开
desc: 求解三个函数的Laurent展开，包括在奇点附近和不同区域。

title: 复变函数作业：解析延拓与奇点
desc: 证明两个级数互为解析延拓，并分析级数的奇点分布。

title: Spring Vibration Problem Analysis
desc: Derives wave equation, boundary and initial conditions for a hanging spring with mass.

title: Math Physics Homework 10: Spherical Harmonics
desc: Expand functions in spherical harmonics and solve Laplace equation with source terms.

title: Math Physics Homework 11: Integral Calculation
desc: Compute integral using substitution and Bessel function J2.

title: Critical Radius of Cylindrical and Spherical Uranium Blocks
desc: Derivation of critical radius for cylindrical and spherical uranium blocks using neutron diffusion equation.

title: Dirac Delta Function Identities in Physics
desc: Proofs of delta function properties in 1D and 3D coordinates.

title: Laplace Transform for Forced Oscillations
desc: Solving forced vibration with Laplace transform, partial fractions, and inverse transform.
